dict.string: raceApp connects to your OBD2 adapter over Bluetooth to read live engine data.
Your location is recorded during sessions to capture speed, position, and altitude.
Allow Always so recording keeps running with the screen locked or the app in the background during a session. Your location never leaves the device.
Motion and barometer data are recorded during sessions to measure G-forces and elevation.
raceApp records the front and rear cameras during a session so footage stays synced with your drive data.
Microphone audio can be saved with session camera footage.
Session camera clips are also saved to Photos so you can re-import them if needed.
